query: UPDATE daily_editorial SET body = REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(body, 'l\'AI agentiva', 'i sistemi AI autonomi'), 'AI agentiva', 'sistemi AI autonomi'), 'agenti AI', 'agenti AI') WHERE id = 450001;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3aGZ9MSLrhgSbtV.0a4dfe1f8b2a --database UyPaon6i3Ec4nvfPz6kUfg --execute UPDATE daily_editorial SET body = REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(body, 'l\'AI agentiva', 'i sistemi AI autonomi'), 'AI agentiva', 'sistemi AI autonomi'), 'agenti AI', 'agenti AI') WHERE id = 450001;
